# CappingAlpha

> CappingAlpha is a sports information and data platform. We collect public sports data at scale, run advanced models and calculations over it, and compare the results against sportsbook markets to show where the value and the likelihood sit. The output is a single daily board of the day's highest-conviction plays. Free users see the number one ranked play; paid users see the full ranked board.

We are an informational and research service, not a sportsbook. We do not accept wagers and we never tell anyone how to play a game. If you choose to bet, the numbers are here to help you decide.

## What it does

- Pulls together player data, historical outcomes, public market behavior, live lines, and weather for each game.
- Normalizes everything through a proprietary scoring engine and ranks it into one daily board. The exact methodology is proprietary.
- Compares the ranked output against live sportsbook markets to surface where value and likelihood sit.
- Tracks the highest-conviction plays long term and grades each one win, loss, or push once the game finishes.
- Covers MLB, NBA, WNBA, NFL, NCAAF, CBB, NHL, Soccer, Tennis (ATP and WTA), and Golf.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://cappingalpha.com/): the live ranked board. Free users see the number one pick.
- [Track record](https://cappingalpha.com/results): every graded MVP pick, with the running win, loss, and push record.
- [FAQ](https://cappingalpha.com/faq): what CappingAlpha is, how picks are ranked, pricing, and how the record is kept.
- [Terms of Service](https://cappingalpha.com/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](https://cappingalpha.com/privacy)

## Pricing

- $1 for a single day (one-time)
- $4 per week (subscription)
- $75 per year (subscription)
- Free tier always shows the number one ranked pick of the day.

## Important notes

- CappingAlpha never wagers on any game and never tells anyone how to bet. It surfaces and ranks data; the user decides.
- All performance data is for informational purposes only. Past results are not indicative of future outcomes.
- Users must be 18 or older.
